changes.value: In entity-inspector.tsx lines 252-260, the editing dispatch for the default/markdown case uses FieldPlaceholderEditor directly rather than the shared MarkdownEditor component with mode='full'. The MarkdownEditor was designed for exactly this purpose and would use EditableMarkdown in full mode. Currently the inspector edit path bypasses the shared editor abstraction for its most common case.\n\nThis is a partial deduplication -- the whole point of card 2 was to funnel through shared editors.
entity-inspector: FieldDispatch edit path for default markdown uses FieldPlaceholderEditor instead of MarkdownEditor
